mapper.select:
select * from sj_sjpz where 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and date between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and date BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59')
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
GROUP BY sbid,DATE ORDER BY DATE DESC

select * from sj_sjpz_copy where 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and date between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 8 DAY)
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
GROUP BY sbid,DATE ORDER BY DATE DESC

select * from sj_sjpz where 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and date between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and date BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59')
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
GROUP BY sbid,DATE ORDER BY DATE DESC

select * from sj_sjpz_copy where 1=1
and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{param.sbbh})
and date between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 8 DAY)
and sbid like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbid}), '%')
GROUP BY sbid,DATE ORDER BY DATE DESC
select * from sj_sjpz where bj = '0' and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{sbid})
mapper.update: update sj_sjpz set bj = '1', tsdw = #{tsdw}, tsjg = #{tsjg} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from sj_sjpz where date(date) = date_sub(curdate(),interval 1 day) and FIND_IN_SET(sbid,#{sbid})
mapper.update: update sj_sjpz set yxbj = '1', tsyx = #{tsyx} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sj_sjpz_copy SELECT * FROM sj_sjpz WHERE TO_DAYS(NOW()) > TO_DAYS(xtsj)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sj_sjpz WHERE TO_DAYS(NOW()) > TO_DAYS(xtsj)
mapper.select: select * from sj_sjpz where sbid = #{sbid} and #{date} > date order by date desc limit 1
